_readme: Git-tracked manifest for all third-party photos in public/photos/. An entry here is required before a file is used anywhere on the site or in the DB. Run 'npm run sync-attribution' after approving entries in the admin to sync approval state into this file, then commit.

rules: Words within a field : single hyphen, e.g. allman-bros-museum
license slugs        : cc-by-sa-4 | cc-by-4 | cc-by-nc-4 | cc0 | pd

_workflow.tier_1_prefill: Rename the file to the naming scheme → upload via admin → filename is parsed and attribution fields are auto-populated in the DB (attribution_approved = false).
_workflow.tier_2_approve: Open the Attribution Review panel in admin → edit any fields (especially source_url) → click Approve (sets attribution_approved = true in DB).
_workflow.tier_3_sync: Run 'npm run sync-attribution' from nikkis_great_musicfestivals/ → script pulls all approved entries from DB and writes approved: true + approved_at into this file → commit.

_fields.author: Creator name as it appears in the credit line
_fields.source_url: Canonical URL of the original work (e.g. Wikimedia Commons file page)
_fields.changes: Description of any modifications, or null if unmodified
_fields.added: ISO date this file was added to the archive
_fields.used_in: Places this file is referenced (filled automatically by sync script)
_fields.approved: true once reviewed and approved in the admin Attribution Review panel
_fields.approved_at: ISO date approval was confirmed (filled automatically by sync script)
